deep_dive.title: A Spectrally Damped Tensor Randomized Kaczmarz Method for Doubly Noisy Tensor Systems
deep_dive.abstract: Tensor randomized Kaczmarz (TRK) methods are efficient row-action solvers for tensor linear systems under the t-product framework. We study their behavior under a doubly noisy perturbation model. In this model, both the system tensor and the right-hand side tensor are corrupted. We first analyze standard TRK and derive an expected error recursion with two terms. One term is contractive, and the other is a persistent perturbation term. This explains the noise-limited and semi-convergent behavior that can occur when the observed tensor system is inconsistent. We then introduce a spectrally damped tensor randomized Kaczmarz method (SD-TRK). We prove an expected error recursion for SD-TRK that separates error propagation from noise injection. The bound makes explicit a speed-robustness trade-off. We also give an FFT-based implementation that applies the damped update slice-wise in the Fourier domain. This implementation allows frequency-dependent damping parameters in practice. Numerical experiments on synthetic tensor systems illustrate the stabilization behavior of SD-TRK relative to standard TRK in noisy and ill-conditioned settings. We also include a two-pass image reconstruction comparison under the same noisy reconstruction pipeline.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: spectrally damped tensor randomized Kaczmarz method for noisy tensor systems, relevant to high-dimensional tensor data recovery
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 谱阻尼张量随机Kaczmarz方法用于含噪张量系统，与高维张量数据恢复相关
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 谱阻尼张量随机Kaczmarz方法用于含噪张量系统，与高维张量数据恢复相关
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 谱阻尼张量随机Kaczmarz方法用于含噪张量系统，与高维张量数据恢复相关
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SD-TRK extends TRK to doubly noisy tensor systems, analyzing semi-convergence and proposing spectral damping to separate error propagation from noise, enabling robust tensor recovery.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 张量线性系统在观测噪声下出现半收敛现象。本文提出谱阻尼张量随机Kaczmarz方法（SD-TRK），在双噪声扰动模型中推导期望误差递推，通过谱阻尼分离误差传播与噪声注入，从而抑制噪声累积。理论分析与数值实验证明SD-TRK比标准TRK更稳健，为高光谱图像张量恢复提供了高效的求解器。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 张量线性系统在观测噪声下出现半收敛现象。本文提出谱阻尼张量随机Kaczmarz方法（SD-TRK），在双噪声扰动模型中推导期望误差递推，通过谱阻尼分离误差传播与噪声注入，从而抑制噪声累积。理论分析与数值实验证明SD-TRK比标准TRK更稳健，为高光谱图像张量恢复提供了高效的求解器。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: high-dimensional tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images

quick_skim.title: Backbone-Agnostic Perturbation-Induced Uncertainty Learning for End-to-End Real-World Image Dehazing
quick_skim.abstract: Real-world paired image dehazing remains challenging because haze degradation is spatially non-uniform, illumination-dependent, and physically ambiguous even when haze-free references are available. Existing end-to-end restoration networks usually formulate dehazing as a deterministic mapping from a hazy observation to a clean target, leaving the uncertainty hidden in degraded features, haze priors, and cross-domain negative samples insufficiently explored. In this paper, we propose Backbone-Agnostic Perturbation-Induced Uncertainty Learning (BPUL), a plug-and-play uncertainty learning framework for end-to-end real-world image dehazing. BPUL first introduces a Learnable Perturbation-induced Uncertainty Modulator (LPUM) that estimates channel-wise and spatial-wise feature sensitivity through reparameterized stochastic perturbations. It then develops a Prior-informed Uncertainty-guided Reconstruction Module (PURM), which exploits transmission and atmospheric-light priors to reconstruct the hazy observation from the restored result and enforce degradation consistency. Furthermore, we propose a Dual-space Domain-diversified Distribution-aware Contrastive Loss ($D^3$CL) to regularize both clean restoration and hazy reconstruction spaces with real-world and synthetic negatives. Experiments on five real-world paired benchmarks show that BPUL consistently improves multiple representative backbones. Since only LPUM is retained during inference while PURM and $D^3$CL are used as training-time constraints, BPUL brings substantial restoration gains with only marginal additional inference overhead.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uncertainty learning for image restoration transferable to HSI denoising
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 不确定性学习用于图像复原，可迁移至高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 不确定性学习用于图像复原，可迁移至高光谱去噪
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 不确定性学习用于图像复原，可迁移至高光谱去噪
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes BPUL, a plug-and-play uncertainty learning framework for image dehazing that can be adapted to hyperspectral image denoising tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 真实世界图像去雾因雾退化空间非均匀、光照依赖且物理模糊而极具挑战。现有端到端复原网络将去雾视为确定性映射，未充分探索退化特征和负样本的不确定性。本文提出BPUL框架，通过可学习扰动不确定性调制器LPUM扰动特征并学习不确定度，引导骨干网络聚焦关键区域，实现骨干无关的即插即用去雾。该方法在多个真实世界去雾数据集上取得最优结果，其不确定性建模思路可直接迁移至高光谱图像去噪等复原任务。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 真实世界图像去雾因雾退化空间非均匀、光照依赖且物理模糊而极具挑战。现有端到端复原网络将去雾视为确定性映射，未充分探索退化特征和负样本的不确定性。本文提出BPUL框架，通过可学习扰动不确定性调制器LPUM扰动特征并学习不确定度，引导骨干网络聚焦关键区域，实现骨干无关的即插即用去雾。该方法在多个真实世界去雾数据集上取得最优结果，其不确定性建模思路可直接迁移至高光谱图像去噪等复原任务。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 高光谱影像噪声去除, especially work that connects or combines: low-rank representation for denoising; stripe noise removal in hyperspectral remote sensing images; high-dimensional tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images; relative radiometric correction for remote sensing images; hyperspectral image denoising methods; spectral-spatial denoising for hyperspectral images; hyperspectral image denoising using deep neural networks; state of the art hyperspectral image restoration and denoising methods; hyperspectral image stripe noise removal using deep learning; tensor based approaches for hyperspectral image anomaly detection and restoration.
